headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Says Macro Risks May Be Overstated for Automatic Data Processing (ADP)
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.46%, Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 21, Cantor Fitzgerald lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) to $244 from $306. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares.
